comments.title: Trusted by modern marketing teams
comments.description: From acquisition to retargeting, teams use App Template to produce better ad creatives faster and at lower cost.
comments.comment1Comment: App Template dramatically reduced our creative turnaround time. We launch new ad variants in hours, not days.
comments.comment2Comment: We generate video and image ads in one workflow and keep everything on-brand. It made scaling campaigns much easier.
comments.comment3Comment: The quality is consistently strong, and iteration is fast. It's become part of our weekly ad production process.
comments.comment4Comment: Lower production cost, faster testing cycles, and better creative output. Exactly what a growth team needs.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about creating ads with App Template.
faq.question1: What inputs can I use to generate ad creatives?
faq.answer1: App Template supports product images, descriptions, campaign briefs, URLs, and direct text input. AI uses these inputs to generate campaign-ready creatives.
faq.question2: Can I generate both video and image ads?
faq.answer2: Yes. App Template supports both video and image ad generation, so teams can create multi-format creatives in one workflow.
faq.question3: Is my uploaded content secure and private?
faq.answer3: Yes. Uploads and processing are protected with secure infrastructure and encryption standards.
faq.question4: Who is App Template built for?
faq.answer4: App Template is designed for modern marketing teams that need better ad quality, lower production cost, and faster creative iteration.
faq.question5: How does App Template improve ad performance?
faq.answer5: By helping teams produce more relevant, on-brand creatives faster, App Template enables quicker testing cycles and better-performing campaign assets.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our pricing and plans

items.question: What happens when my credits run out?
items.answer: Generation is paused when credits are insufficient. Free and Starter users can upgrade directly; Pro and Enterprise users should contact sales for higher quota options.

items.question: Can I manage billing details in app?
items.answer: Billing management is handled by Stripe Billing Portal for security and reliability.

items.question: Can I change plans later?
items.answer: Yes. You can switch plans anytime through Stripe Billing Portal, and changes apply according to Stripe billing rules.

items.question: What is the difference between monthly and yearly billing for credits?
items.answer: Your plan allowance refreshes every month on the same schedule whether you pay monthly or yearly. Yearly billing only changes how often you are charged (once per year at a discount), not how credits are issued.

items.question: Do unused credits roll over to next month?
items.answer: No. Unused credits do not roll over; your balance resets to the plan allowance on each monthly refresh.

items.question: Can I cancel anytime?
items.answer: Yes. You can cancel your subscription anytime in Stripe Billing Portal. Your current period remains active until it ends.

about.title: About App Template - AI Ad Creative Platform for E-Commerce Teams
about.keywords: App Template, App Template AI, app.example.com, AI ad creative platform, stunning ad creatives, AI video ads, AI image ads, creative automation, campaign-ready assets, e-commerce marketing
about.ogImageAlt1: App Template AI — create stunning ads with AI | app.example.com
about.ogImageAlt2: App Template AI — AI platform for video and image ad creatives | app.example.com
about.description: App Template helps brands create stunning AI ad creatives across video and image — from idea to campaign-ready assets with speed, consistency, and brand control.
about.heroTitle: We Make High-Performance Ad Creative Accessible
about.heroSubtitle: We built App Template because high-quality ad creative shouldn't require a big budget or a production team. Our AI tools deliver studio-grade results — at a fraction of the traditional cost.
about.whatWeStandForSubtitle: The principles that guide everything we build.
about.missionDescription: To help marketing teams make better ads without burning budget. AI takes raw ideas and turns them into campaign-ready creatives — faster, cleaner, and at a fraction of traditional production cost.
about.missionTrusted: Built for lean, high-output marketing teams
about.visionDescription: To become every marketing team's go-to creative engine — where quality, speed, and scale work together instead of against each other.
about.visionSupport: Supports global campaigns and brand consistency across channels
about.storyImageAlt: App Template team collaborating on creative work
about.storyP1: For years, ad production has forced teams into the same trade-off: quality, speed, or cost. Most brands could only optimize two, and the third became a constant bottleneck in execution.
about.storyP2: App Template exists to break that constraint by turning fragmented creative work into one AI-native workflow. Instead of switching between disconnected tools and manual handoffs, teams can move from idea to launch in a single system.
about.storyP3: Our goal stays simple: help teams ship better ads, iterate faster on what works, and scale creative output without runaway production costs. Better quality should not require slower cycles or bigger teams.
about.valuesSectionSubtitle: These principles shape how we prioritize, build, and deliver.
about.valueAIDrivenDescription: AI is built into creation, optimization, and iteration so teams ship better creative, faster.
about.valueCustomerDescription: We start from real marketing constraints and measurable outcomes, then build for everyday execution.
about.valueQualityDescription: Speed matters only when quality holds. Every workflow is designed for polished, on-brand output.
about.valueGlobalDescription: Built for multilingual campaigns across markets, without losing brand consistency.
about.ctaTitle: Ready to create high-performing ads at lower cost?
about.ctaSubtitle: Use AI to ship polished, on-brand creative faster — without a large production team.
about.ourMissionDescription: We believe that marketing should be efficient and engaging. Our platform uses advanced AI to transform any content into professional marketing videos, making e-commerce marketing more accessible and effective.
about.aboutTenoDescription: App Template (app.example.com) is an AI ad creative platform for producing stunning videos, images, and campaign assets with speed and control.
about.getStartedDescription: Ready to level up your creative process? Sign up and start creating stunning ad content with App Template.

meta.title: URL to Video - Turn Product Links into AI Videos
meta.description: Paste any product URL and App Template turns it into a professional AI-generated video ad in minutes — built for e-commerce, social media, and product showcases.

hero.title: URL to Video <highlight>Ad Maker</highlight>
hero.subtitle: Drop a URL & Get a Video for Free. It's That Simple!
hero.authHint: Not signed in? We'll ask you to log in before continuing.

featuresSection.heading: URL to Video Maker Features
featuresSection.subheading: Everything you need to create professional product videos in minutes

smartProductUnderstanding.title: Smart Product Understanding
smartProductUnderstanding.description: App Template understands your product page structure and turns raw listing content into clear product context for video generation.

scriptAngles.title: Script Angles That Convert
scriptAngles.description: Generate ad-ready script directions based on product info, then refine messaging before you render the final video.

multiPlatformSupport.title: Multi-Platform Support
multiPlatformSupport.description: Use product links from Amazon, Shopify, eBay, WordPress, App Store, Google Play, and more with consistent extraction quality across platforms.

howItWorksSection.heading: Create Videos in 3 Simple Steps
howItWorksSection.subheading: Extract product context, refine script direction, and export a ready-to-publish video.

step1.title: Paste Product URL
step1.description: Drop an e-commerce product link and App Template extracts product details, selling points, and available media.

step2.title: Refine Script Direction
step2.description: Review generated script angles and adjust messaging so the final video matches your product and audience.

step3.title: Generate and Export
step3.description: Render a polished product video with your chosen format and settings, then export and publish fast.

faqSection.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faqSection.subheading: Key questions before your first URL-to-video conversion.

q1.question: What types of product URLs are supported?
q1.answer: We support major e-commerce URLs including Amazon, Shopify, eBay, WordPress, App Store, Google Play, and more. Paste your product link and App Template will extract product details and available media automatically.

q2.question: How long does it take to produce a video?
q2.answer: Most videos are ready in a few minutes, depending on media quality, script complexity, and output settings.

q3.question: Can I customize the output before exporting?
q3.answer: Yes. You can refine script direction, adjust visual style, and tune output settings like format and duration before final export.

q4.question: What video formats and resolutions are available?
q4.answer: Videos are exported in MP4 and support common aspect ratios like 16:9, 9:16, and 1:1 for cross-platform publishing.

q5.question: Is there a limit to how many videos I can create?
q5.answer: The number of videos depends on your subscription plan. Free users get 3 videos per month, while paid plans offer 20 to unlimited videos. Check our pricing page for details.

q6.question: Can I use the videos for commercial purposes?
q6.answer: Yes, you can use videos for ads and product marketing. Please make sure your source assets and product materials have the appropriate usage rights.

ctaSection.heading: Paste a link. Get a campaign-ready video.
ctaSection.subheading: Launch high-converting product videos faster with AI-powered creation built for e-commerce teams.

meta.title: Video Insight - Decode Viral Videos for Winning Ads
meta.description: App Template Video Insight analyzes any top-performing video into reusable hook, structure, and script insights you can apply to your own ad creatives.

hero.title: Turn Viral Videos into <highlight>Actionable Insights</highlight>
hero.subtitle: Break down winning video patterns, extract script logic, and apply them to your next ad in minutes.
hero.urlPlaceholder: Paste a video URL (TikTok, YouTube, Instagram Reels...)
hero.supportsNote: Supports TikTok, YouTube, Instagram Reels, and direct uploads.
hero.scriptCardText: "Stop scrolling. Here's the one thing that changed my routine in 7 days..."

featuresSection.heading: Decode What Makes Winning Video Ads Work
featuresSection.subheading: Analyze hooks, scripts, and performance signals you can reuse.

hookAndStructure.title: Hook Pattern Mapping
hookAndStructure.description: Map opening hooks, scene progression, and pacing shifts into a reusable structure you can apply to new ad concepts.

scriptExtraction.title: Script & Caption Blueprint
scriptExtraction.description: Turn spoken lines and on-screen text into editable script blueprints for faster rewrite and adaptation.

creativeScorecard.title: Creative Performance Scorecard
creativeScorecard.description: Score hook strength, narrative clarity, and CTA impact with prioritized recommendations for the next iteration.

howItWorksSection.heading: Apply Viral Patterns in 3 Practical Steps
howItWorksSection.subheading: Paste a source video, extract reusable insights, then turn them into your next ad direction.

step1.title: Paste Source Video URL
step1.description: Add a TikTok, Shorts, or Reels link to ingest the source creative and start analysis instantly.

step2.title: Extract Patterns & Script Signals
step2.description: Break down hook structure, pacing shifts, and caption/script elements into reusable creative patterns.

step3.title: Turn Insights into Your Next Ad
step3.description: Convert extracted patterns into a clearer ad brief and direction for your next creative iteration.

faqSection.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faqSection.subheading: Key questions about getting the most from Video Insight.

q1.question: Which platforms are supported?
q1.answer: You can analyze videos from TikTok, YouTube, and Instagram Reels, and also upload local video files for analysis.

q2.question: How accurate is script extraction?
q2.answer: Extraction combines speech and visual text recognition to produce high-quality script references for creative analysis.

q3.question: Can I reuse these insights in my own ads?
q3.answer: Yes. The workflow is designed to help you adapt patterns and direction into original ad creatives for your products.

q4.question: How long does analysis take?
q4.answer: Most videos are processed within 30 to 60 seconds. Longer assets may take up to a few minutes.

q5.question: Can I directly copy analyzed scripts?
q5.answer: Video Insight is intended for learning and adaptation. You should produce original creatives instead of copying source content directly.

ctaSection.heading: Turn viral videos into your next winning creative.
ctaSection.subheading: Start free and turn top-performing videos into clearer ad decisions for your team.

meta.title: Product Video Generator - Studio-Ready, Fast
meta.description: Turn a single product image into polished marketing videos with App Template's AI motion, flexible style controls, and fast export.

hero.title: Create <highlight>Stunning</highlight> Product Videos at Lower Cost
hero.subtitle: Turn your product assets into campaign-ready videos with controllable motion and consistent brand quality.
hero.hint: No editing software required. Start free and export fast.

featuresSection.heading: Purpose-Built Workflows for Product Video
featuresSection.subheading: Uses preset scenes and templates to deliver higher quality, better control, and faster output.

motionReady.title: Preset Scene Starters
motionReady.description: Start from built-in product-video scenes so your output begins with ad-friendly structure instead of a blank setup.

styleControl.title: Template-Level Control
styleControl.description: Use guided controls on templates to tune motion direction, style behavior, and ratio with more predictable results.

exportReady.title: Higher-Quality Output, Faster
exportReady.description: Produce campaign-ready product videos with less trial-and-error and faster turnaround than general-purpose generation flows.

howItWorksSection.heading: Create Product Videos in 3 Steps
howItWorksSection.subheading: From product assets to launch-ready videos with speed, control, and consistent quality.

step1.title: Add Product Assets
step1.description: Import product inputs (image, key frame, or supported sources) to define subject and scene context.

step2.title: Set Motion and Style
step2.description: Choose model, aspect ratio, and motion direction to match each channel and campaign goal.

step3.title: Generate and Publish
step3.description: Render your video and export a ready-to-publish asset for storefronts, ads, and social.

faqSection.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faqSection.subheading: Key questions before your first product video run.

q1.question: What input do I need to start?
q1.answer: A clear product image is enough to begin. You can then define motion and output settings.

q2.question: Can I control video aspect ratios?
q2.answer: Yes. You can generate outputs for common formats like 16:9, 9:16, and 1:1.

q3.question: How long does generation usually take?
q3.answer: Most product videos are generated within a few minutes, depending on model and settings.

q4.question: Can I use outputs for commercial campaigns?
q4.answer: Yes. Please ensure your uploaded product assets have the appropriate usage rights.

q5.question: Do I need editing experience?
q5.answer: No. The workflow is designed for marketers to produce strong outputs without complex editing tools.

ctaSection.heading: From product assets to launch-ready video — no editing needed.
ctaSection.subheading: Start free and create campaign-ready product videos in minutes.

meta.title: Product Photo - AI-Generated Ad-Ready Product Images
meta.description: Create clean, brand-fit product photos from a single upload with App Template's AI style controls, scene presets, and fast export.

hero.title: Studio-Quality Product Photos, <highlight>In Seconds</highlight>
hero.subtitle: Upload a photo, pick your style — get ad-ready visuals for every channel, no studio needed.
hero.hint: One upload. Multiple polished visuals. No studio needed.

featuresSection.heading: The Fastest Way to Ad-Ready Product Photos
featuresSection.subheading: One upload, multiple polished visuals — ready for every channel.

studioQuality.title: Studio Polish, Zero Setup
studioQuality.description: Clean backgrounds, sharp details, and balanced lighting — every output comes out ad-ready.

styleControl.title: Your Style, Your Scene
styleControl.description: Switch between studio, outdoor, luxury, and more — every output fits your brand and channel.

campaignReady.title: One Upload, Multiple Looks
campaignReady.description: From one photo, get ad, social, and storefront-ready visuals — no repeat work.

howItWorksSection.heading: Studio-Quality Photos in 3 Simple Steps
howItWorksSection.subheading: From raw product input to polished visuals — fast, consistent, and channel-ready.

step1.title: Upload Product Input
step1.description: Start with any clear product image, cutout, or packshot — no studio setup or pro gear required.

step2.title: Set Style and Scene
step2.description: Pick a style preset or customize your own — studio, outdoor, luxury, and more.

step3.title: Export and Publish
step3.description: Download polished visuals ready for storefronts, ads, and social content.

q1.question: Do I need a professional source image?
q1.answer: No. A clear product photo is all you need — no studio lighting or professional equipment required.

q2.question: Can I get multiple styles from one upload?
q2.answer: Yes. Swap style presets to produce multiple visual directions from the same photo in seconds.

q3.question: How fast can I get results?
q3.answer: Most results are ready in seconds. Exact timing may vary by style and output settings.

q4.question: Are outputs suitable for paid ads?
q4.answer: Yes. Outputs are designed for campaign usage across ad and commerce channels.

q5.question: Can I use these images commercially?
q5.answer: Yes, as long as your source materials and product assets have proper commercial rights.

ctaSection.heading: Studio-quality product photos. No photographer, no studio.
